attributes.action: Consider revoking Social Media ban and enforcing tighter restrictions instead.
attributes.additional_details: I think getting rid of social media for all British citizens under the age of 16 needs to be considered on a deeper level.As social media is a way to relax,chill out and decompose after a long school day.It is used as mental health support method and enforcing a ban will cause more rebellion amongst young people opening them up to further bullying issues.
attributes.background: Consider restricting the social media ban for under 13s instead of 16s,and enforcing tighter restrictions to protect younger people from cyber-bullying in a online setting.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Government ban on social media to be for under 13s only
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757849
